faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What do I get after purchasing?
faq.a1: You will get a ZIP archive containing the complete, structured source code (Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS), complete installation instructions, and a ready-to-use APK download link for relevant app categories. A unique license is also included in your dashboard.
faq.q2: Do these templates support Android / iOS (APK) installation?
faq.a2: Yes! Some of our templates (like POS, IoT dashboard, and Business apps) are configured using CapacitorJS/Cordova. You will get the web source code along with a starter-kit configuration to directly build the APK on your Android device.
faq.q3: How do I deploy the application?
faq.a3: Our web templates are 100% compatible with Vercel, Netlify, or conventional VPS. Our deployment instructions include steps for PostgreSQL database setup with Prisma ORM for secure production integration.
faq.a4: Every license purchase includes lifetime free update access for that template. The changelog and latest download files will always be automatically updated in your Purchase Dashboard.
faq.a5: Because our products are digital goods/source code that can be fully copied, we do not offer refunds once the files are downloaded. However, our support team is ready to help 24/7 if you experience technical issues.

testimonials.title: Developer Community Support
testimonials.t1: Newlera Stack cut our POS dashboard build time by 60%. The Tailwind v4 and Prisma configuration inside is very clean and production-ready. Highly recommended!
testimonials.t2: The IoT dashboard template is highly responsive and the APK is instantly ready to test on our industrial monitors. The aesthetics are luxurious, not your average template design.
testimonials.t3: The JWT auth and user profile modules are very easy to modify. The live demo is highly accurate and the code documentation is well structured.
